DEFENDANT CORDELIA HAMPTON IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS ASSISTED BY SPANISH INTERPETER KENNETH WRIGHT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: BRIAN STRETCH; CLERK: D. CARTER. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
ORDER SC-105A(ORDER ON REQUEST FOR COURT ORDER)DENIED**

THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE. NO APPEARANCES BY PLAINTIFF GUILLERMA BOJORQUEZ-ALARCON. NO APPEARANCES BY DEFENDANT CORDELIA HAMPTON. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. VISITING JUDGE: SYLVIA HUSING; CLERK: L. YOUNG. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
